architecture.summary: No new architecture. refresh-plugins.ts reads config.adapters.default via existing readConfig(). Static adapter-to-directory map derived from existing compilePlugin() implementations. copyPluginSkillsToProject() gets optional targetSkillsDir parameter. No new modules or abstractions.

integrations.summary: No new external integrations. Uses existing readConfig() from config-manager.ts. Claude CLI integration unchanged for claude adapter. Static mapping replaces adapter loader instantiation.

ui-ux.summary: CLI-only change. Mode display message shows actual adapter name and target directory instead of always 'Claude CLI' or '.claude/skills/'. Summary section location display updated similarly. No new flags or options.

performance.summary: Minimal impact. One additional async readConfig() call at startup. Static map lookup instead of adapter instantiation. Non-Claude path skips Claude CLI detection entirely (faster).

security.summary: No security changes. File copy targets are project-local directories only. Adapter name from trusted config.json. No new CLI commands. Claude settings modifications gated to Claude-only path.

edge-cases.summary: Four edge cases: (1) config.adapters.default unset — falls back to Claude. (2) Unknown adapter name — falls back to Claude with warning. (3) No config.json — readConfig returns defaults with adapters.default='claude'. (4) readConfig() throws — catch and default to Claude.
